action: Error fixed — ReferenceError import path useTasks
detail:
ReferenceError: Cannot find module '../hooks/useTasks'
  at App.jsx:3

Cause:  filename casing (useTasks.js vs usetasks.js on Linux)
Fix:    renamed + corrected import
Status: ✅ resolved

action: 4 files created / modified — hooks, utils, components
detail:
+ src/hooks/useTasks.js        (new — state + localStorage persistence)
+ src/utils/storage.js         (new — getItem/setItem JSON + try/catch)
~ src/App.jsx                  (modified — import useTasks)
~ src/components/TaskList.jsx  (modified — props from useTasks)

useTasks exposes: tasks, addTask, toggleTask, deleteTask

action: Stack decided: React + localStorage — no backend required
detail:
Reason: fast prototype, no server-side persistence required.

Chosen structure:
  src/
    components/TaskList.jsx
    components/TaskItem.jsx
    components/AddTaskForm.jsx
    hooks/useTasks.js
    utils/storage.js

localStorage format: JSON array [{ id, title, dueDate, done }]
No external libraries — vanilla CSS.

Complexity: low — no identified risks

Breakdown:
  - useTasks hook + storage util   ~1h
  - UI components (3 files)        ~1h30
  - Integration + CSS polish       ~30min
  - Manual QA (5 scenarios)        ~1h
  - Build + staging deployment     ~30min

Total estimated: 4h30

action: 4 user stories defined — Must / Should / Could
detail:
US-01 [Must]   — Create a task with title + date
US-02 [Must]   — Mark a task as completed
US-03 [Should] — Filter by status (todo / done)
US-04 [Could]  — Reorder by drag & drop

Out of scope: authentication, multi-user, notifications
